name: ComplyAdvantage AML API
description: The ComplyAdvantage API enables integration with AML (Anti-Money Laundering) services for automated sanctions screening, PEP checks, adverse media monitoring, and search management. Supports creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting searches, managing monitored searches, and webhook notifications.
